summary: Lead accepts RR0-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 after systems R3 recommended R0_GATE=PASS, independent QA R3 returned ACCEPT, and final integration gates passed. The task is ACCEPTED pending PR, required CI, merge, and origin/main synchronization; it is not CLOSED and R1 remains frozen.

tests_run.command: node taskctl.mjs validate <all five RR0 task IDs>; node taskctl.mjs list; node taskctl.mjs ready
tests_run.result: All five RR0 tasks validate; first four are CLOSED, Exit was REVIEW before Lead acceptance, and ready output is empty.

tests_run.command: validate-handoff.mjs systems R3; validate-handoff.mjs QA R3
tests_run.result: Both final systems and independent QA handoffs are schema-valid; QA verdict is ACCEPT with no blocker.

tests_run.command: Node parse all tracked JSON files
tests_run.result: Parsed 1447 tracked JSON files before Lead acceptance-state write.

tests_run.command: git diff --check origin/main..HEAD; Node forbidden-path assertion origin/main..HEAD
tests_run.result: No whitespace errors; 19 changed paths and zero forbidden product, package, test, content, CI, tool, dependency, historical Gate, or R1 paths.

tests_run.command: Node lifecycle, readiness, baseline, thread-registry, route-surface, continuation, and QA verdict assertions
tests_run.result: Pre-acceptance REVIEW state was internally consistent; all ready arrays were empty; one Lead, the same QA, systems closed, six sent route surfaces identical, and QA ACCEPT recorded.

tests_run.command: git worktree list; protected M7 status; R1/RR1 task count
tests_run.result: Exactly two worktrees; protected M7 retains exactly 20 entries; no R1/RR1 task file exists.

decisions.decision: Set RR0-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 to ACCEPTED pending actual main integration. Do not set CLOSED before PR and CI succeed and origin/main contains the evidence.
The evidence supports R0_GATE=PASS, but the durable Gate marker and R0 closure are deferred until accepted evidence enters origin/main.
Do not create or start the R1 task graph before R0 closure.

risks.summary: Normal Web/Electron still lacks authoritative Worker command/query/save/load/time-control integration.
The protected M7 worktree retains 20 pre-existing entries and remains untouched.
R1 must replace static runtime-gap evidence with real production integration tests.

requested_action: Push the accepted R0 Exit branch, create the PR, wait for all required CI, merge, synchronize origin/main, and only then close R0 and create the controlled R1 task graph.
